name: Minute Steak Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. round steak or cube steak (1 to 2)
6 medium carrots, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the steak and cube it.
2. Roll in seasoned flour.
3. Brown in shortening with chopped onions and peppers in fat-free beef broth.
4. Place into a large Dutch oven.
5. Pour in sauce with 2 cans water.
6. Add potatoes, carrots, and peas.
7. Cook slowly until tender, about 1 hour.
